creator: matthias@petermann-it.de
text:
Created attachment 146084
Patch to apply described changes.

The attached patch:

* updates version from 2.2.2 to 2.3.1
* converts to USES=python

Detailed information on the new version can be found in the changelog:

https://github.com/coleifer/peewee/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md
